HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT HILARY SUTHERLAND'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. HILARY SUTHERLAND HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Continued To May-28-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered Defendant Justin M. Schwartz dismissed without prejudice. The case is scheduled for a Case Management Conference set for 5/28/2010 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted; Request For Attorney Fees Of $125.00 Plus Filing Fees Of $40.00
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Asset Acceptance, LLC's Motion To Deem Facts Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters in Plaintiff's Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $165, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
